arts.sum:
The standout match on the weekend Serie A fixture list comes from Rome on Monday when Lazio and Inter - both three points adrift of the leaders - will face off at Stadio Olimpico and 
Joe Champion has correct-score picks for all 10 Serie A matches.

arts.ttl: Second Man United star 'wanted by Napoli' with Antonio Conte 'to follow Scott McTominay blueprint'
arts.sum: Napoli reportedly emerge as serious contenders to sign Manchester United forward Joshua Zirkzee during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Preview: Udinese vs. Napoli - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Serie A clash between Udinese and Napoli, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
